query:
-- Check all services for C2753 now
SELECT s.externalId, s.planName, s.serviceType, s.provider, s.monthlyCost, s.status,
  sba.billingItemExternalId as assignedTo
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
WHERE s.customerExternalId = 'C2753'
ORDER BY s.serviceType;

-- Check all services for C2753 now
SELECT s.externalId, s.planName, s.serviceType, s.provider, s.monthlyCost, s.status,
  sba.billingItemExternalId as assignedTo
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
WHERE s.customerExternalId = 'C2753'
ORDER BY s.serviceType;
